CLAIM OF EXEMPTION PACKET FOR HEARING DATE OF 04/25/19 RECEIVED AND FILED.

THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION SET FOR MAY-09-2019 IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF JEROME BERNAL IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MARCO DELA VEGA. DEFENDANT JENNIFER JORDAN IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER FILED MAY 21, 2019: THE REQUEST IS DENIED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE INFORMATION PROVIDED BY PLAINTIFF/ASSIGNEE IN RESPONSE TO COURT ORDER OF MARCH 22, 2019 IS INSUFFICIENT.

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar May-09-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: On May-09 Order Granting Claim of Exemption was erroneously sent to Santa Monica Sheriff's Department and San Francisco Sheriff's Department. On May-15 I found out that the correct Sheriff's Office for this exemption is Alameda. I re-sent to all parties (including Alameda Sheriff's) a Certified copy of the Order Granting Claim.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Apr-29-2019 Continued To May-09-19 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 506

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-18-2008 Judgment Entered
